message:
fix(doctor): correct version message formatting

The version message was incorrectly prefixing "v" to a version string
that already contained the version prefix (e.g., "vbv v0.11.1" instead
of "bv v0.11.1").

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
